response.answer:
Daily logs live in the project area at:

- `/[projectId]/daily-log`

This is documented in the curated help article `docs/help/articles/daily-log.md` and the feature registry entry `daily-log`.

What I checked:
- App expert artifact status: both generated artifacts are current
- Feature registry: found a documented “Daily Log” feature
- Help article: confirms you open **Daily Log** from the project sidebar

Relevant source references:
- Help article: `docs/help/articles/daily-log.md`
- Route in feature registry: `/[projectId]/daily-log`
- Route file: `frontend/src/app/(main)/[projectId]/daily-log/page.tsx`

If you meant the general table route instead of the project-scoped daily log, there is also a route-discovered page at `/daily-logs`, but that one has no linked help article.

toolTrace.detail: App Expert produced an answer from read-only app knowledge tools.
